session.user: Run `pytest tests/tui/` and report the results. Just run the tests and report whether they pass or fail, and if they fail, show the failure details.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest tests for the TUI module and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run TUI tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
